executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
STRICT REQUIREMENT: The application is running on http://localhost:4175. DO NOT USE PORT 5173. Use data-testid attributes for all interactions: input-asset, input-modal, input-risiko, input-entry, input-stoploss, btn-calculate, btn-roast, btn-won, btn-lost, btn-delete. 

GENERATE AND EXECUTE AT LEAST 6 TEST CASES covering:
1. Basic position calculation and saving with all fields.
2. Position calculation without optional Asset Pair.
3. Edge case: Exactly 5% risk calculation and saving.
4. Edge case: Division by zero prevention (Entry Price = Stop Loss).
5. AI Risk Evaluator (Gemini) triggering and feedback verification.
6. Journal management: Updating status (Won/Lost) and deleting entries.

Follow the TESTING.md instructions for Playwright E2E tests. Ensure all 6+ tests are executed.
